title: docs: Fix formatting mistake
body:
Part of this section was a code block, and part of it was absorbed into the preceding normal paragraph.

Before/after:

![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/2390950/88001136-06392d80-cac5-11ea-99ab-4865ed529882.png)

comments.body: Can you make the same change to `podman-run.1.md` in the same directory?

You should also mention 
--http-proxy=true|false
Which will set some environment variables as well.
We really should have a test that makes sure the hierarchy works, and stays working.
I've made most of the changes. I'm looking into how --http-proxy=true|false fits in now.
LGTM once the HTTP proxy change makes it in.
Done. Please take a look at what I did for the --http-proxy docs. I can squash these if needed, but I think it makes sense to keep them separate.

For anyone curious, the --http-proxy and the --env-host code are in the same function:

https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/be5219ab9529c596421dd19bb61cdd2ced267ece/vendor/github.com/containers/common/pkg/config/config.go#L706-L722

Strictly speaking, neither one overrides the other. --env-host copies in all host environment variables, while --http-proxy only copies in a subset.
